hooks.command: powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($json) { $fp = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -and $fp.EndsWith('.php') -and (Test-Path $fp)) { $phpExe = (Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)?.Source; if ($phpExe) { & $phpExe -l $fp 2>&1 } } }"

powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($json) { $cmd = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'eval-file|wp_insert_post|wp_update_post') { Write-Output 'REMINDER: Run WP Fastest Cache flush after bulk updates. PHP: if(class_exists(WpFastestCache)){$wpfc=new WpFastestCache();$wpfc->deleteCache();}' } }"

powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command "$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($json) { $fp = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -and $fp -match 'wp-content.*\.php') { $content = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.content; if ($content -match 'wp_insert_post') { Write-Output 'REMINDER: New article PHP script detected. After publishing, generate featured image with: python3 workspace/tools/comfyui_generate.py --prompt "..." --output "workspace/generated-images/post-{id}-{slug}.jpg"' } } }"
powershell.exe -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code needs attention — ClearLegalTips', 'Claude Code', 'OK', 'Information')"
